attrs.description: The frame shows a facility with a distinctive circular ring road layout situated in a rural area surrounded by rectangular agricultural fields. Inside the circular compound, there is a central area with paths leading to multiple outer lobed or semi-circular pads arranged in a symmetrical pattern. Several of these pads contain small, indistinct objects or structures. To the west of this circular area is a support complex with multiple rectangular buildings, paved courtyards, and trees. Additional rectangular utility or support structures are located directly south of the circular ring road. The entire site is integrated into a grid of green and brown agricultural plots divided by narrow dirt or paved access roads.
attrs.gsd_note: Sufficient to resolve the overall layout, roads, and building footprints, but insufficient to identify small objects or vehicles on the pads with high confidence.

observed_features.note: Encloses the central compound
Semicircular driveways branching off the main loop
Located west and south of the circular site
Surrounding the entire facility

The entire site is integrated into a grid of green and brown agricultural plots divided by narrow dirt or paved access roads.

attrs.description: A ground-level perspective photograph taken at night on a wet city street, showing a convoy of wheeled armored vehicles. In the foreground, a large multi-wheeled armored vehicle with headlights on is driving on the asphalt. Behind it, a line of several more armored vehicles with headlights illuminated extends into the background. On the right side, onlookers standing on the sidewalk are holding up smartphones to film or photograph the passing convoy. The street surface is wet and reflective. Overhead streetlights and trolleybus or tram wires are visible. A timestamp reading 'OCT 26, 23:47' is located in the bottom right corner.

observed_features.note: Driving in a line on the street with headlights on
Wet, reflective asphalt street with painted lane markings
Paved sidewalk with onlookers filming the vehicles
Suspended wires and elevated glowing lamps casting warm light

attrs.description: The image shows a large, sprawling urban area with extremely high density, low-rise buildings packed closely together. To the western/left edge of the frame, portion of an airfield runway and taxiway system is visible amidst open dirt terrain. To the southeast, there are agricultural fields with varied green and brown rectangular plots. In the northeastern portion, there is a large rectangular grid-patterned area (possibly a structured plantation, orchards, or a planned layout). Several main road arteries cut through the dense urban fabric. Individual vehicles, aircraft, or small tactical objects are not clearly resolvable due to the high-altitude perspective.
attrs.gsd_note: High-altitude satellite overview; individual tactical objects or vehicles cannot be resolved.

observed_features.note: Airfield structure visible on the middle-left edge.
Tightly packed, low-rise buildings covering most of the central and southwestern areas.
Cultivated plots in the southeastern corner.
A large grid-like pattern in the northeastern corner.

count.unit: heavy multi-axle vehicles with cylindrical canisters

attrs.description: A ground-level photograph showing a public parade on a paved urban street. At least three large, multi-axle wheeled vehicles painted in green camouflage are visible, each carrying a cluster of four large cylindrical canisters on its rear bed. Uniformed personnel in dress uniforms are marching alongside the vehicles. On the left and in the background, a dense crowd of spectators is watching, with many individuals holding up mobile phones to capture images and waving small flags. The background features buildings and various flags mounted on lampposts.

observed_features.note: Large dark-green camouflaged vehicles with prominent cabs and cylindrical cargo canisters.
observed_features.shape: Rectangular chassis with cylindrical rear canisters

observed_features.note: Spectators holding up phones and flags to view the parade.
Personnel marching alongside the heavy vehicles.

count.unit: heavy multi-axle vehicles carrying cylindrical canisters

attrs.description: A ground-level photograph depicting a public parade. Multiple large, green, multi-axle heavy transport vehicles are visible, each carrying a cluster of four large cylindrical canisters on its rear bed (arranged in a 2x2 bundle). The vehicles are driving in a column along a wide, paved city street. The street is lined with crowds of spectators on both sides, many of whom are holding up mobile phones to photograph the scene or waving small flags. In the background, there are streetlights, multi-story buildings, and numerous flags mounted on poles. Soldiers in uniform are also visible marching near the vehicles.

observed_features.note: Multi-axle large transport vehicles with green camouflage livery
Large dark green tubes carried on the rear of each vehicle

count.unit: large wheeled military transport vehicles with cylindrical canisters

attrs.description: A ground-level perspective of a public military parade on a multi-lane paved city street. Multiple large, dark-green wheeled vehicles (multi-axle) are driving in a column, each carrying a cluster of four large cylindrical canisters on its bed. Spectators are crowded along the side of the road in the foreground, many holding up mobile phones and small national and regional flags. Uniformed personnel are marching on foot alongside the vehicles. Numerous flags and lampposts line the route in the background under an overcast sky.

observed_features.arrangement: aligned in a column on the street

observed_features.arrangement: grouped in clusters of four per vehicle
observed_features.note: mounted on the rear bed of the transport vehicles

observed_features.arrangement: lining the sides of the street
observed_features.note: crowd holding up mobile phones and flags

count.unit: rectangular structures/pads inside the central circular loop road

attrs.description: The image shows a facility nested in a densely forested, hilly area. At the center is a distinctive circular loop road enclosing several light-colored rectangular structures or pads. North and east of this loop are additional support buildings, cleared areas, and terraced plots. In the lower-left corner, there is a larger built-up area containing clusters of rectangular buildings and agricultural fields. A major divided highway is visible in the upper-left corner, and several small lakes or ponds are scattered around the perimeter.
attrs.gsd_note: Resolution is sufficient to distinguish roads, building footprints, and layout features clearly.

observed_features.note: A central loop road enclosing multiple structures
Small light-colored structures or pads located inside the central loop road
Barracks-style and utility buildings located to the north, east, and southwest of the central loop
Small ponds or lakes on the edges of the forested hill

attrs.description: The image shows a high-resolution overhead view of a large, roughly triangular compound situated within a highly developed urban area. In the center of the compound is a prominent, symmetrical circular track layout containing internal loops, lobes, and pathways resembling a driving training course or specialized test track. Directly south of this circular feature are multiple rectangular administrative buildings, courtyards, and several rows of parked vehicles. To the west of the main compound, a small athletic field with a reddish running track is visible. The entire site is surrounded by dense grids of multi-story residential apartment buildings and a network of urban roads.
attrs.gsd_note: High-resolution satellite imagery with clearly defined road networks, buildings, and vehicle alignments.

observed_features.arrangement: symmetrical cloverleaf loops inside a outer circle
isolated adjacent to the west wall of the central plot

Directly south of this circular feature are multiple rectangular administrative buildings, courtyards, and several rows of parked vehicles. To the west of the main compound, a small athletic field with a reddish running track is visible. The entire site is surrounded by dense grids of multi-story residential apartment buildings and a network of urban roads.

attrs.description: The overhead image shows a facility situated within a rugged, hilly, and partially forested landscape. At the center of the frame is a cleared, loop-shaped compound containing multiple graded dirt pads. On the southeastern pad, a linear row of approximately 9 to 11 rectangular vehicles or trailers is parked side-by-side. On the northwestern pad, a smaller linear row of approximately 5 to 7 vehicles is visible. Additional equipment, vehicles, and small support structures are clustered near the center of this loop. To the west and southwest, several larger rectangular support buildings are distributed along a dirt road network. On the eastern side of the image, a large rectangular double-bermed or double-fenced enclosure is situated on the slope of a hill. Numerous dirt tracks and trails traverse the surrounding hilly terrain.

observed_features.note: A row of vehicles/trailers parked side-by-side on a southeastern graded pad.
A smaller row of vehicles/trailers parked side-by-side on a northwestern graded pad.
A central loop-shaped cleared area containing graded earth pads for vehicle parking.
Rectangular buildings situated to the west and southwest of the main loop.
A double-bermed or double-fenced rectangular area on the eastern slope.
